title: SPOKE Common Types
description: Shared type definitions for SPOKE wire schemas.

ExtensionMap.description: Product namespace bag keyed by product-chosen ids matching ^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$. Values are opaque JSON objects. Adapters MUST preserve unknown namespaces and keys on round-trip.

TimelineScale.description: L5 Timeline projection tier (open string). Core vocabulary (documented, not enforced): brief, narrative, moment. Wire field name timeline_scale — not tier or projection.

scope_id.description: Protocol-neutral opaque selector. Products map World/Book/chapter/manuscript ids via adapters or op extensions.

entry_ids.description: Optional narrow scope to explicit KnowledgeEntries.

entry_types.description: Optional filter by open entry_type vocabulary.

timeline_event_ids.description: Optional narrow scope to explicit L5 TimelineEvent ids.

source_id.description: Optional provenance or manuscript locator scope.

timeline_scale.description: Optional L5 tier filter (brief, narrative, moment).

fork_id.description: Optional L5 branch filter — strict equality on TimelineEvent.fork_id (l5-fork).

ComputableFieldMap.description: Open map of product-owned computable field names to domain values. Shared by KnowledgeEntry body.state and body.computable under l2-computable. Protocol does not require WASM bytecode or executable artifacts.

path.description: Dot-path or JSON Pointer to changed field within body.computable.

logged_at.description: When the computable field change was recorded (RFC 3339).

entry_id.description: KnowledgeEntry id whose computable fields changed.

session_id.description: Opaque Session correlation (matches op session_id when omitted on parent context).
